MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Screen for Child Anxiety Related Disorders – Parent version

Levels.ses-cbt03: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 3 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt08: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 8 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt12: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 12 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).

scared_breathe.Description: 1. When my child feels frightened it is hard for him/her to breathe.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_headache_school.Description: 2. My child gets headaches when he/she is at school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_dislike_strangers.Description: 3. My child doesn't like to be with people he/she doesn't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_sleep_away_home.Description: 4. My child gets scared if he/she sleeps away from home.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_like_me.Description: 5. My child worries about other people liking him/her.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_pass_out.Description: 6. When my child gets frightened he/she feels like passing out.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_follow_parent.Description: 8. My child follows me wherever I go (he/she is like my "shadow").

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_look_nervous.Description: 9. People tell my child that he/she looks nervous.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_nervous_around_stranger.Description: 10. My child feels nervous with people he/she doesn't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_stomachache_school.Description: 11. My child gets stomachaches at school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_feel_crazy.Description: 12. When my child gets frightened he or she feels like he/she is going crazy.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_sleep_alone.Description: 13. My child worries about sleeping alone.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_not_as_good.Description: 14. My child worries about being as good as other kids.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_not_real.Description: 15. When my child gets frightened he/she feels like things are not real.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_nightmare_parents.Description: 16. My child has nightmares about something bad happening to his/her parents.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_school.Description: 17. My child worries about going to school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_hr_fast.Description: 18. When my child gets frightened his/her heart beats fast.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_nightmare.Description: 20. My child has nightmares about something bad happening to him/her.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_things_work_out.Description: 21. My child worries about things working out for him/her.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_sweat.Description: 22. When my child gets frightened he/she sweats a lot.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_no_reason.Description: 24. My child gets really frightened for no reason at all.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_alone_at_home.Description: 25. My child is afraid to be alone in the house.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_hard_to_talk.Description: 26. It is hard for my child to talk with people he/she doesn¬ít know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_choke.Description: 27. When my child gets frightened he or she feels like he/she is choking.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_worry_too_much.Description: 28. People tell my child that he/she worries too much.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scaared_away_from_family.Description: 29. My child doesn¬ít like to be away from his/her family.

scared_party.Description: 40. My child feels nervous when he/she is going to parties dances or any place where there will be people that he/she doesn¬ít know well.

scared_par_total_score.Description: SUM of all 41 questions with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_par_panic_or_somatic.Description: SUM of the following 13 items: (1,6,9,12,15,18,19,22,24,27,30,34,38) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_par_generalized_anx_disordr.Description: SUM of the following 9 items: (5,7,14,21,23,28,33,35,37) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_par_separation_anx_disorder.Description: SUM of the following 8 items: (4,8,13,16,20,25,29,31) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_par_social_anxiety_disorder.Description: SUM of the following 7 items: (3,10,26,32,39,40,41) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_par_school_avoidance.Description: SUM of the following 4 items: (2,11,17,36) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.
